query: What is the password rotation policy?

request.start.query: What is the password rotation policy?

answer: Passwords must be rotated every 90 days. Users may not reuse any of their last 10 passwords. Temporary passwords issued by IT must be changed on first login. Passwords must not be shared, written down, or stored in unencrypted form. Systems that do not support the full password complexity requirements must implement compensating controls approved by the InfoSec team [it_security_policy.pdf#chunk-3].
